description: Quarter-turn cam latch: a round head above the panel (slotted tool-recess or plain knob), a double-D body through the panel cutout forming the housing, and a flat cam arm clamping at the grip depth behind the frame. One solid, drawn latched.
source: Southco E5 literature (head, double-D cutout 20.1/14.1 A/F, housing 27.2-68.2, cam 33-45, grip 4-42+); cam width/thickness proportions
